## Problem

What problem or workflow friction are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

What would you like LoopTroop to do differently?

## Workflow impact

Which part of the workflow would this affect?

- Project setup
- Ticket creation
- Interview / PRD / planning
- Beads / execution / retries
- OpenCode integration
- Final review / pull request delivery
- Documentation
- Other:

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you considered?

## Additional context

Add screenshots, examples, links, or notes that help explain the request.
